title.en: CLEANING, FILLING WITH LIQUIDS OR SEMILIQUIDS, OR EMPTYING, OF BOTTLES, JARS, CANS, CASKS, BARRELS, OR SIMILAR CONTAINERS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR; FUNNELS
Bottling liquids or semiliquids; Filling jars or cans with liquids or semiliquids using bottling or like apparatus; Filling casks or barrels with liquids or semiliquids
{Applications of control, warning or safety devices in filling machinery (flow-control B67C3/28)}
{Bottling or like apparatus specially adapted to be transported, e.g. positioned on a truck or in a container}
Bottling liquids or semiliquids; Filling jars or cans with liquids or semiliquids using bottling or like apparatus
Concurrent cleaning, filling, and closing of bottles; Processes or devices for at least two of these operations
{Sterilising, aseptic filling and closing (B67C3/2642 takes precedence)}
{Lever action devices operated by hand or foot}
Devices for emptying bottles, not otherwise provided for {(during preparation of alcoholic beverages except beer C12G1/00)}
Funnels, e.g. for liquids (filter funnels B01D29/085; volume flow-meters G01F)
{comprising closures, e.g. stoppers, caps or lids}
